actual_wave_verification_rate.rationale: Base centered on plan commitment 0.85 (DEFAULT); no plan-internal passage anchors a shift. Low-side spread to 0.65 reflects Risk 2 cascade-sync failure and Issue 3 (planetary-scale prevents perfect synchronization across waves).

wave3_actual_completion_month.rationale: Base centered on plan commitment Month 16 (DEFAULT). High-side anchored on Issue 3 explicit sensitivity: 6-month sequence slip to Month 22 plausible under planetary-scale synchronization failure, missing the 24-month legal deadline.

projected_peak_hub_density.rationale: Base just under the 13,000 cap reflects modular-housing-deployment intent (Risk 8 mitigation). High side to 18,000 reflects Question-7 stated 15,000 internal cap plus expert-criticism stress case of failed decentralization.

cip_count_moved_south.rationale: Anchored on Question-3 1,000-personnel Vertical-Stacks staffing analogue scaled by severable Northern critical systems (power, water, data). Wide 4x spread reflects unspecified scope of Decision-3 CIP swap.

monthly_replacement_unit_cost_usd.rationale: Base reflects loaded international specialist contractor monthly rate. High-side anchored on Issue-2 sensitivity (3:1 ratio inflates labor 25% over baseline) plus crisis-driven wage inflation under 24-month mandate.

cip_replacement_ratio.rationale: Base 2.0 is the review-recommended 2:1 buffer (Issue 2). High-side anchored on Issue-2 explicit sensitivity that actual ratio may be 3:1, inflating immediate labor cost 25% over baseline for 24 months.

correlations.rationale: Issue 2 forecasts coupled movement: when the realized replacement ratio drifts up to 3:1, specialized-labor scarcity also inflates per-staffer cost. Both respond to the same Northern human-capital-flight driver under Decision 3.
